summary: Frontend-only testing of single-file Arabic RTL football news app. All 7 requested flows verified successfully: initial MARCA load with Arabic translations, switching across all 4 sources (Marca/L'Equipe/Gazzetta/Sky) each returning 10 translated articles with correct per-source accent color, Arabic-word search filtering, empty state, clear button, bookmark toggle with count & localStorage persistence across reload, share button (no crash), and refresh button.

issues: Mixed-content warnings (harmless, upgraded to HTTPS): MARCA feed embeds an http://secure-uk.imrworldwide.com tracking pixel that browser auto-upgrades. Not a functional issue.
Tailwind Play CDN warning 'should not be used in production' — acceptable for this single-file demo but flag for prod hardening.

critical_code_review_comments: Tailwind CDN in production: consider building Tailwind at build time.
Translation cache in localStorage may grow unbounded — consider TTL/size cap.
MyMemory free API has strict daily quota; app already handles fallback gracefully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-file app at /app/frontend/public/index.html served at root. React not mounted. All data-testids present. Verified: tab-marca/lequipe/gazzetta/skysports each returned 10 articles with Arabic titles and correct accent colors (#e11d2a, #2563eb, #ec4899, #14b8a6). Bookmark persistence across reload confirmed via localStorage 'gfpt_bookmarks'.
